description: Colombian drug trafficking organization active from the 1980s to 1998, based in the Caribbean region of Colombia. It controlled drug trade routes to the Caribbean and Central America, initially operating autonomously and later as a franchise of the Medellín and Cali cartels. The group was led by José Rafael Abello Silva and later Alberto Orlández Gamboa. It dissolved in 1998 due to arrests, deaths, and the incursion of the AUC paramilitary group.

country_links.evidence_quote: un fallido envío de droga de Colombia a España
country_links.context: The cartel attempted to send a drug shipment from Colombia to Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: Arana fue capturada en Suiza en febrero de 1994
country_links.context: A member of the cartel was captured in Switzerland.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tras la captura y extradición a Estados Unidos del entonces jefe del cartel de la Costa, José Rafael Abello Silva ...
country_links.context: The cartel sent cocaine shipments to the United States, and its leaders were extradited there.
